calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration
TENTATIVE RULING: Off calendar
EXAMINER: AERO FETH

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting, Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Feb-23-2026 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar May-21-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

This matter was put on for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated March 15, 1999 is admitted to probate. Pyong Soon Sim is appointed as the Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Order for the same signed in open Court. If either a petition for final distribution, or a petition for approval of report on status on administration is filed two weeks prior to the hearing date, the status hearing will go off calendar. Status on close of estate is set for June 22, 2026 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Michael Kasolas is appointed Probate Referee.

Judge: Rene A. Chouteau. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Thompson. Not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Apr-21-2025 Continued To May-21-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
